title: Giant Demon Clan
content:
The Giant Demon Clan’s territory was very large. When they moved over from another planet, they made an agreement with the one who was Suzaku at the time and were given this land to flourish upon.

In the Giant Demon Clan, there were 12 Giant Demon Palaces. All 12 palaces looked the same and were very large.

The 
Giant Demon
 are similar to Ancient God in that they cultivate the Body and can devour the cultivation of other but weaker.

They have technique similar to the technique of the Ancient God, the Heaven Opening Technique.

They also have hint of Ancient God Blood, and their true power come from their Blood at the Soul Transformation.

It's shown that Lei Ji, Planet Suzaku's Giant Demon Clan Founder, obtained a change in his bloodline when he heard Wang Lin's Ancient God Roar and felt like he found his true master.

The Royal Bloodline of the Giant Demon Race contain trace of the Ancient God, the more Ancient God Blood in the Giant Demon Bloodline, the more Noble their Bloodline.

The Giant Demon race should have been the Ancient God's servant race and bestowed the Nine Cultivation of Titan based on the Ancient God Tactic.
